positive: A symmetrical, neo-art deco style illustration featuring an intertwining composition of celestial elements and deep jungle flora. The central motif is a stylized crescent moon cradling geometric galaxies, surrounded by elegant, symmetrical monstera leaves, palm fronds, and luminous bioluminescent orchids. The composition must maintain strong, clean silhouettes with sharp lines, suitable for a repeating pattern or central apparel graphic. Use a highly contrasting color palette of deep indigo, glowing emerald green, metallic gold accents, and matte black. The style should mimic linocut print techniques mixed with glowing watercolor details. Central composition, high contrast, vector graphic quality, dramatic rim lighting, clean linework, wallpaper print style.
negative: blurry, text, watermark, signature, logos, complex shadows, gradient noise, fuzzy edges, bad anatomy, extra limbs, low resolution, amateur drawing, messy, realistic photography, cartoonish, illegible, noise
